memberdef.argsstring: (this, nx, ny, nz, grid_type, coord_system, rc)
memberdef.name: geometry_init

briefdescription.para: Get number of x grid points.
Get number of y grid points.
Get all grid dimensions at once.
Get grid cell area at position (i,j)
Get grid cell volume at position (i,j,k)
Check if column (i,j) is local to this processor.
Check if there are more columns to process.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, nx, ny, nz, error_mgr, grid_type, coord_system, rc)
memberdef.name: grid_manager_init

briefdescription.para: Get total number of columns in the grid.
Get number of local columns on this processor.
Get grid shape (nx, ny, nz) as a convenience.
Get column view for specific indices.
Get column view by geographic location.
Create column iterator for processing all columns.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, i1, j1, i2, j2, distance, rc)
memberdef.name: grid_manager_compute_distances

briefdescription.para: Check if grid manager is ready for use.
Create a virtual column for the given (i, j) indices.
